summary: Iteration 8 — Trail Epilogue cutscene + Shareable Postcard (feature a) and Time-of-day & Weather-aware lore audio variants (feature d) verified end-to-end against the public preview URL. BACKEND: 16/16 pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iter8_self_guided.py (1.7s). BACKEND-A1 ✓ GET /api/self-guided returns the 3 seeded journeys (sg-pl-old-town, sg-nc-coastal-loop, sg-lm-maroon-trail) each with a progress block {started, completed_stops[], completed, total, percent, finished}; no _id leaked. BACKEND-A2 ✓ POST /api/self-guided/sg-lm-maroon-trail/start returns ok:true and the listing reports progress.started=true (verified in DB: active_self_guided='sg-lm-maroon-trail'). BACKEND-A3 ✓ Sequential check-ins at lm-trail-1/2/3 — first two return finished:false, xp_gain:0, epilogue:None; the third returns finished:true, xp_gain:90 (==journey.xp_reward), badge_unlocked:'badge-maroon-trail', and the full epilogue payload with all required keys (journey_id, title, subtitle, theme_color, theme_hex, title_earned='Maroon Trail Walker', epilogue, stops[3], xp_gain, badge_unlocked, completed_at). Repeated final check-in returns xp_gain:0 and epilogue:None — confirms NO re-award. BACKEND-A4 ✓ GET /api/self-guided/{id}/epilogue-audio (no auth) returns 200 audio/mpeg, >1kB. BACKEND-D1 ✓ ?tod=dusk&weather=rain writes cache to sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__intro__dusk__rain.mp3; no-query call writes to sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__intro.mp3 — both verified on disk. BACKEND-D2 ✓ ?tod=night&weather=clear epilogue cache file present. BACKEND-D3 ✓ ?tod=golden_hour&weather=cloudy stop audio cached as sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__lm-trail-1__golden_hour__cloudy.mp3; a second combo (night/rain) writes to a DISTINCT cache file — variants truly cached separately. BACKEND-D4 ✓ Invalid tod=banana&weather=xyz does NOT 500 — falls back to the default no-context cache file (intro.mp3). BACKEND-D5 ✓ Second call to the same variant URL returns in <0.5s (cache hit). FRONTEND-A2 ✓ Dispatching window.CustomEvent('andeor:trail-completed', {detail:epilogue}) renders the TrailEpilogue container with data-testid='trail-epi-sg-lm-maroon-trail' (TrailEpilogueWatcher is globally mounted in RpgHud). FRONTEND-A3 ✓ All three beats render with correct testids: trail-epi-mono (beat 1), trail-epi-title (beat 2), trail-epi-postcard (beat 3). Space advances beat 1→2; the explicit 'Take your postcard' (trail-epi-claim) button advances beat 2→3 (Space also works when container is focused). Postcard step has all 3 buttons: trail-epi-share, trail-epi-download, trail-epi-close (plus trail-epi-skip in header). FRONTEND-A4 ✓ Clicking SAVE PNG (trail-epi-download) flips text to 'RENDERING…' for <0.5s then settles back to 'SAVE PNG' with a 'Postcard saved to your device!' toast — html2canvas + Blob download triggered cleanly, zero JS pageerrors. FRONTEND-D3 ✓ TrailEpilogue mount auto-fires the epilogue-audio request with tod & weather query params present in the URL — captured network call: /api/self-guided/sg-lm-maroon-trail/epilogue-audio?tod=night&weather=clear. FRONTEND-D1 / FRONTEND-D2: verified by code symmetry — SelfGuidedModal.toggleIntro() (lines 53-54) and SelfGuidedHud.playStopAudio() (lines 89-91) call the identical resolveAudioContext + withAudioContext helper pair that FRONTEND-D3 proved works end-to-end (tod & weather params written into the URL). The same helper module (/app/frontend/src/lib/context.js) is imported in all three components.

issues: The body/middle of the postcard card is intentionally blank between the subtitle row and the 'Stops conquered' list — looks slightly empty at 1920x1080 since there's no signature flourish/illustration there. Cosmetic, not blocking. The footer signature ('An Deor Admin' + role badge) sits well; just consider adding a subtle map or steps motif behind the empty middle.

critical_code_review_comments: self_guided.py _ctx_key() treats unknown tod/weather as 'any' which collapses to '' (the empty suffix) — so a stray ?tod=banana&weather=xyz will silently reuse the no-context cache and return whatever was generated for the default narration. That's the spec'd behaviour (graceful fallback) but it does mean a buggy frontend sending typos would never know — consider logging a warning so QA notices a bad client.

self_guided.py /checkin route has no auth-gated rate-limit; a malicious client can rapidly POST checkins to spam the badge endpoint. XP/badge re-award is already idempotent, so impact is low — but consider a per-user-per-journey rate limit.

self_guided.py /start returns {'ok':True,'already':True} when re-called on a started journey but does NOT re-set active_self_guided (line 446-448 early return). If a user previously stopped (active=null) but progress is partial, calling /start again will return early without re-activating the HUD. Consider re-setting active_self_guided in the 'already' branch too.

self_guided.py /auth/me does NOT expose active_self_guided — the frontend HUD relies on the andeor:self-guided-changed event + the /api/self-guided list endpoint to know which journey is active. This is implicit and easy to miss; document it or add active_self_guided to the /auth/me payload.

TrailEpilogue.jsx — the postcard middle region is visually empty for the (relatively) tall card (~270px between subtitle and stops list). At least at desktop widths consider adding a subtle illustration or map silhouette to fill the dead space.

TrailEpilogue.jsx — beat advancing on Space requires the container to have focus. If the user clicks the SKIP button briefly and then presses Space they may unexpectedly skip the next beat. The trail-epi-claim explicit button is the safer affordance — Space should be considered a power-user shortcut.

context.js resolveAudioContext() falls back silently to 'clear' weather when Open-Meteo is unreachable — confirmed by the FRONTEND-D3 capture showing 'weather=clear' from the preview network. Document this fallback prominently so it doesn't look like the weather feature is broken in dev environments without outbound network.
main_quests.py:504 — earlier-iteration lint nit (removed unused already_codes) confirmed clean; no carry-over issues.

Cache filename suffix __{tod}__{weather} is collision-safe but does NOT include a version/hash of the lore text — if the journey lore is edited the old cached MP3 will still be served. Add a content hash or invalidation hook.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all NEW Trail Epilogue cutscene flows verified end-to-end (A2/A3/A4) and the epilogue-audio context query params confirmed in network capture (D3); D1/D2 verified via code symmetry to the same helper function

test_credentials: Admin: admin@andeor.mu / AnDeor2026!. Ephemeral test player created per pytest run: TEST_iter8_<ts>@example.com / explore123.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates one fresh TEST_iter8_<ts>@example.com player via POST /api/auth/register (cleaned up only at MongoDB level if needed; not blocking). Generated TTS cache files written to /app/backend/uploads/audio/: sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__intro.mp3, sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__intro__dusk__rain.mp3, sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__epilogue.mp3, sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__epilogue__night__clear.mp3, sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__lm-trail-1__golden_hour__cloudy.mp3, sg__sg-lm-maroon-trail__lm-trail-1__night__rain.mp3. Approximately 25-40 KB each; persist across runs as cache.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-guided router prefix is /api/self-guided. Journey IDs: sg-pl-old-town (4 stops, sunset theme #E27447), sg-nc-coastal-loop (3 stops, ocean #0F8FA8), sg-lm-maroon-trail (3 stops, jungle #1B6F4B — shortest path for end-to-end). XP rewards: 80/70/90 respectively. Audio cache lives at /app/backend/uploads/audio/sg__{journey}__{type}[__{tod}__{weather}].mp3 — invalid (tod,weather) collapses to no-suffix filename. The frontend trigger for TrailEpilogue is a window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('andeor:trail-completed', {detail: epilogue})) — TrailEpilogueWatcher is mounted globally in RpgHud and listens for that event. Testids on TrailEpilogue: trail-epi-{journey_id} (container), trail-epi-mono / trail-epi-title / trail-epi-postcard (beat content), trail-epi-skip (header), trail-epi-listen (beat1), trail-epi-claim (beat2 'Take your postcard'), trail-epi-share / trail-epi-download / trail-epi-close (beat3 buttons). The download button uses html2canvas + Blob; confirmed working in headless Chromium (no JS pageerror). resolveAudioContext() helper falls back to weather='clear' silently when Open-Meteo is unreachable — confirmed network capture shows 'weather=clear' from the preview environment.
rca_of_the_issue: Initial test failure on TestA2StartJourney was a TEST-side issue (not an app bug) — /api/auth/me does NOT expose the active_self_guided field, so asserting against it returned None. Switched the assertion to verify progress.started via GET /api/self-guided which reads from db.users.self_guided_progress — confirmed active_self_guided was correctly set in MongoDB. No app bug. All 16 backend cases pass and all frontend flows for feature (a) + feature (d) are confirmed working end-to-end.
